ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the member */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the member's account (hashed for security) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the organization */,
  "member_status_code" TEXT /* Status of the member's account (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the member's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the member */,
  "account_lockout_date" TEXT /* Date the member's account was locked out due to excessive failed login attempts */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the member */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the member */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_statuses" (
  "status_code" TEXT /* Code for the member status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the member status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the member status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member attempting to login */,
  "login_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the login attempt */,
  "mobile_login_flg" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the login was via mobile (0=no, 1=yes) */,
  "login_status_code" TEXT /* Status of the login attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for the login attempt */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for the login attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_login_status_code FOREIGN KEY ("login_status_code") REFERENCES login_statuses ("status_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_statuses" (
  "status_code" TEXT /* Code for the login status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the login status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the login status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES member_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_role_assignments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member requesting a password reset */,
  "reset_date" TEXT /* Date the password reset was requested */,
  "new_password" TEXT /* New password chosen by the member */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token used to verify the password reset request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member being notified */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_text" TEXT /* Text of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the membership plan */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the membership plan */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the membership plan (in months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_membership_plans" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership plan assignment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member being assigned a membership plan */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership plan being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the membership plan was assigned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the membership plan assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_membership_plans_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES membership_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_membership_plans_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)
